title: Programmes & Courses
content: Programmes Offered B.Tech. Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Electronics & Communication Engineering B.Tech. Curriculum Session 2021 onwards B.Tech. Curriculum Session (2018, 2019 & 2020 Batch) Details of Curriculum Session 2015 B.Tech. Curriculum Session 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014 , 2015, 2016, 2017 Proficiency & Minor Programme offered by ECE Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Electronics and Computer Science (ECS) Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design & Technology) Four Year Bachelor Degree Program in Electronics & Computer Engineering (ECM) M.Tech. The Program is offered with the following specializations: (a) Electronics and Communication Engineering (General) (b) Internet of Things (IOT) M.Tech. Curriculum upto 2021 M.Tech. Curriculum Details of M.Tech. Courses Ph.D. The award of the Ph.D. degree is in recognition of high academic achievements demonstrated by independent research and application of knowledge to the solution of technical and scientific problems. Creative and productive inquiry is the basic requirement underlying research work. The academic program leading to the degree involves fulfilling course credit requirements, residential requirements and a thesis giving a critical account of the research carried out, in any of the areas listed below. Digital Image Processing Automation and Control Microwave Engineering Communication Systems Microelectronics Engineering Ph.D. Awarded and Submitted
